name: hireloop
description: Hireloop — India-first AI recruiting platform. Aarya (candidate) + Nitya (recruiter).

scripts.lint: pnpm --filter web lint && pnpm --filter app lint
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter web typecheck && pnpm --filter app typecheck
scripts.clean: pnpm --filter web clean && pnpm --filter app clean
